    Non-GMO Gardening Seeds & More Since 1974

    Garden Seeds, Growing Kits & Supplies - Organic & Heirloom Seeds

    Find out why over a million customers have chosen True Leaf Market Seed Company for their seed and growing needs. We carry a huge selection of vegetable garden seeds, herb seeds & flower seeds, including  heirloom, organic and hybrid seed  types. Try our specialty seeds for microgreens, sprouting, wheatgrass  and cover crops.  Other specialties include grain seeds and asian seeds.  Stock up with our large selection of  growing supplies, growing kits  & gift ideas for indoor home gardening. Check out our garden planner!

    Our happy customers include anyone from hobbyist home gardeners to farms, nurseries, and other professional growers. We offer seeds from home-garden packet quantities to bulk wholesale options. Get free shipping to the lower 48 states on orders over $75. Most orders are processed by the next day, with same day processing in many cases. See what our customers are saying.

    Experience the joy of growing with any level of experience.

    About True Leaf Market Video

    View video transcript

    About True Leaf Market

    For over 50 years, True Leaf Market has been committed to delivering the highest quality non-GMO seeds to growers worldwide. Through our Seeds By Design division in Maxwell, California, we produce several million pounds of seed each year to support the home garden seed industry.

    Our expansive warehouse in Salt Lake City, Utah, allows us to efficiently manage and fulfill orders quickly. Whether you're growing microgreens, wheatgrass, fruits, vegetables, or sprouts, you can rely on our team for super-premium seeds that boost vigor and health.

    Vegetable Seeds

    2,400+ Varieties

    True Leaf Market offers one of the largest selections of vegetable and fruit seeds in the industry. Every seed type can be ordered in convenient garden packets for home growers or in bulk and wholesale quantities for farms, greenhouses, and commercial producers.

    Our catalog includes everything from classic, time-tested garden vegetable seeds to rare, heirloom, hybrid, and specialty seed varieties you won’t find anywhere else.

    We have the largest online selection of amaranth, arugula, Chinese cabbage, cucumber, eggplant, lettuce, melon, pea, radish, summer squash, winter squash, watermelon seeds, and more.

    Herb Seeds

    370+ Varieties

    True Leaf Market also offers one of the most extensive herb seed selections available. Home gardeners and commercial growers alike can order every herb in convenient packets or in bulk wholesale quantities.

    Our collection spans classic kitchen staples, rare and specialty herbs, heirloom varieties, and Asian herbs from Kitazawa Seed Company.

    ALL HERB SEEDS

    Flower Seeds

    475+ Varieties

    True Leaf Market offers 475+ flower seed varieties for home gardeners, greenhouse growers, landscapers, and commercial producers.

    Our flower seeds are available in packets and bulk quantities, covering annuals, perennials, cut-flower varieties, drought-tolerant species, and high-value pollinator plants for bees, butterflies, and beneficial insects.

    The selection includes heirloom, open-pollinated, and hard-to-find specialty flowers ideal for greenhouse production, field planting, and pollinator habitat creation.

    Why TrueLeafMarket.com?

    LIGHTNING FAST, FREE SHIPPING

    Get it fast! Over 96% of our orders ship out within 1 business day. Over half of orders ship same day. Free ground S&H on orders over $75 (lower 48). Shipping upgrades available.

    SELECTION

    We Carry a huge selection of seeds: garden, microgreens, sprouts, flower, grain, cover crop & more. Be sure to check our growing supplies, kits and other products: See all categories.

    NON - GMO, ORGANIC

    100% of our seeds are Non-GMO, and we have a huge selection of organic seed options to choose from. See our Organic Certification & Safe Seed Pledge.

    GUARANTEE

    We back up everything we sell with a 30 day satisfaction guarantee. Please don't hesitate to contact us during business hours. We are just a phone call or email away.

    REWARD POINTS

    Earn reward points on every order. Use rewards points to get a discount on future orders or save up enough for a free order! Also get points for creating an account, sharing socially &  more with our loyalty rewards program.

    EASY ORDERING

    When you create an account, enjoy ecommerce convenience like easy order tracking, payment methods, rapid reorder checkout and more.
